data.name: pageupdate_confirm
data.value: After the update, the selected local page will be replaced. Do you want to continue?

data.name: PageAsist.jkdddd
data.value: Only the main fragments of data acquisition can be operated on

data.name: PageAsist.jkdddd2
data.value: Only the main fragments of data list, data operation, and data acquisition can be operated on

data.name: ImportSel.canjustimportsingle
data.value: Only a single page can be imported

data.name: ImportSel.waid2second
data.value: The new segment has not been fully generated. Do you want to continue waiting for 2 seconds?

data.name: ImportSel.waid5second
data.value: After confirmation, start executing the replacement, with a maximum waiting time of 5 seconds!

data.name: ImportSel.replacefailed
data.value: New component instance page replacement failed, please manually replace!

data.name: ImportSel.pleasemanul
data.value: Failed to perform replacement, please manually replace!

data.name: ImportSel.addfailed
data.value: New component instance page addition failed, please manually replace!

data.name: ImportSel.pleasemanul2
data.value: Failed to perform add, please manually add!

data.name: Option.domin123
data.value: Please specify the upload URL, for example http://www.abc.com Or http://x.abc.com:81

data.name: Option.pleaseselectfile
data.value: Please select the file to upload to the bin directory

data.name: SiteImport.confirmpagereplace
data.value: If the page '{0}' exists, it will be replaced. Continue?

data.name: SplitPublish.checkBox1
data.value: The file name will be the same as the current one after publishing

data.name: SplitPublish.label3
data.value:
Note 1: The local path of the separated publishing file relative to the root directory will be mapped to the site root path. For example, if the root directory is D: \ abc, the file is D: \ abc \ x \ 1. HTML, and the site root path is main/, the file will be published as main/x/1. aspx
笔记

data.name: SplitPublish.label5
data.value: Note 2: Example of separating instance fragments in a file:<ftdp: control id="abc_part" name="List" height="1px" width="100%"></ftdp: control>. You can right-click to copy the clip label to obtain it. If you want to delete HTML elements only at publishing time, add the attribute pubdel=true to the HTML elements to automatically delete static elements at publishing time.

data.name: SplitPublish.button2
data.value: Separate and publish the last time

data.name: SplitPublish.wenjianjabunengweik
data.value: The folder path cannot be empty

data.name: SplitPublish.opensitefirst
data.value: You must first open the site

data.name: SplitPublish.zhidingmulufirst
data.value: Please specify the local root directory first

data.name: SplitPublish.zhidingmulufirst22
data.value: Please specify the root path of the site first, ending in/, and enter the top-level path/

data.name: SplitPublish.wenjianzaijx
data.value: The file must be located under the local root directory

data.name: SplitPublish.pianduanbuunzai
data.value: The fragment instance does not exist in the current site!

data.name: SplitPublish.meiyouzujinjili
data.value: There is no record of recently released detached files

data.name: SplitPublish.qingxianzhidingjt
data.value: Please specify the server static file first

data.name: SplitPublish.qingxianzhidingjt2
data.value: Please first specify the server static file as the absolute path to the disk

data.name: SplitPublish.qingxianzhidingjt23
data.value: Please specify the root path of the site first, ending in/, and enter the top-level path/

data.name: TextEditor.label.dataop
TextEditor.label.dyvalue
TextEditor.label.filterrule
